edges.clue: Both illuminate the sky from above.
The first one names this part of the week.
One bathes the night in silver.
These two sound the same at bedtime.
A grave marker keeps the memory.

Both shine after dark.
A gem that glows with an inner light.

One cuts through the dark on the road.
They split the clock in half.
Everything changes while you sleep.
These two rhyme and both feel rock-hard.
